kit: M3-2 Final Assembly Hardware Pick Pack
basis: AGENTS.md design decisions: no leveling feet, no mechanical endstops

pick_list.notes: Current CAD/hardware CSV calls these inline splice plates, but README describes one connector plate per detected C-beam joint. Verify plate geometry against final corner and splice locations.

pick_list.source_basis: 135 C-beam joint screws + 28 NEMA23 face screws + 8 idler bracket screws
pick_list.notes: Use stainless or zinc-plated alloy steel after corrosion/strength decision. Button-head is preferred where carriage clearance matters.
Used on bottom spacer/idler mounts and through C-beam web locations.
Verify length with final gantry plate thickness and wheel stack before bulk purchase.

pick_list.source_basis: CAD/BOM_README.md M5 fastener totals; covered by bom/data.json id 6
pick_list.notes: Pack quantity intentionally keeps assembly spares and field-service margin.
Used on V-wheel and idler stacks.

pick_list.source_basis: 32 V-wheel axle nuts + 9 idler axle nuts
pick_list.notes: Do not replace with plain nuts unless threadlocker or other locking method is specified.
CAD/bom_hardware.csv currently lists zero here, but AGENTS.md states the NEMA23 motor holes are pass-through and require back-side nuts. Verify on final motor/mount stack.

pick_list.item: M5 split lock washer or wedge-lock washer
pick_list.notes: Optional vibration-control reserve. Use only where it does not disturb wheel preload or plate flatness.

pick_list.spec: 6 mm tall, 10 mm OD, 6 mm bore/off-center
pick_list.notes: bom/data.json currently uses eccentric spacers on all 32 wheel positions for maximum preload adjustability. CAD/BOM_README.md still references 16, so verify against physical assembly.

pick_list.spec: 6 mm tall, about 10 mm OD, M5 clearance bore
pick_list.notes: Outboard wheel spacer between V-wheel and washer/locknut per current bom/data.json wheel stack.
Often included with wheel kits. Keep as an inspection checklist item until supplier wheel kits are frozen.

pick_list.source_basis: AGENTS.md NEMA23 motor mount fastening note
pick_list.notes: Use on motor mount nuts and selected vibration-prone fasteners. Do not use where future wheel preload service requires dry adjustment.

pick_list.spec: TBD clamp, pin-joint, or printed belt anchor hardware
pick_list.source_basis: CAD/BOM_README.md explicitly excludes belt clamps pending inline pin-joint design
pick_list.notes: This is the main remaining mechanical hardware unknown for a shippable final kit. Freeze after belt path and printed clamp geometry are physically verified.
Control box and electronics mounting quantities depend on enclosure/panel layout. Keep as a reserve pack until the electrical panel design is frozen.
Only needed where final 3D-printed parts use inserts. Current NEMA23 mount clarification says pass-through holes do not need heat-set inserts.

audit_flags: Physically verify whether all 32 V-wheel positions need eccentric spacers or whether 16 eccentric plus 16 plain is sufficient.
Freeze belt termination hardware; current CAD hardware notes intentionally exclude belt clamps.
Resolve the NEMA23 back-side nut conflict between AGENTS.md and CAD/bom_hardware.csv.
Confirm connector plate geometry for each of the 27 C-beam joints before buying all plates in one style.
Do not include leveling feet in the reference kit unless the design decision is reopened.
